messages.content: Basket A has 2 apples. Basket B has 1 apple and 2 bananas. Basket C has 1 orange, 1 apple, and 1 banana. Basket D is empty. Take 1 apple from Basket A, Basket B and move them to Basket D. List the content of each Basket.

Basket D: Only one apple is in the final basket.
Basket A: Only one apple is in the final basket.
Basket B: Two bananas and one orange are in the final basket.
Basket C: One banana and one apple are in the final basket.

Basket D: Only one apple is in the final basket.
Basket A: Only one apple is in the final basket.
Basket B: Two bananas and one orange are in the final basket.
